figure_title: Figure 8. SRHT spreads energy but does not give a 3 dB fast-drift win
claim: Diagonal randomization spreads coefficient energy; current fast-drift tests refute the strong full-SRHT advantage gate.
figure_caption: Energy concentration and fast-drift random-comparator evidence. Full SRHT is slightly above the best random basis in sampled fast cells, but it does not beat ordered Hadamard by the requested 3 dB margin.
